## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or skill you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the real-world scenario or problem this would solve.

## Proposed Plugin / Skill

- **Plugin:** `<existing or new plugin name>`
- **Skill name:** `<proposed skill name>`

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references.
